title: Black Aces FC needs your help to reach Cape Town
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Mossel Bay Black...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Mossel Bay Black Aces FC’s U19 team will be playing against Avandale Athlentico FC at the Greens Sportsgrounds in Manenberg, Cape Town, on Saturday 17 January in the Bayhill Premier Cup Tournament play-offs.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Black Aces FC’s U19 team will be playing against Avandale Athlentico FC at the Greens Sportsgrounds in Manenberg, Cape Town, on Saturday 17 January in the Bayhill Premier Cup Tournament play-offs."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On Saturday and Sunday, 96 teams will go head to head, competing for a top spot in the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Black Aces’ head coach, Galela Sicetsha, told Mossel Bay Advertiser he is very excited about the opportunity, the great exposure for the U19 team and the chance to showcase their talents.","html":"The Black Aces’ head coach, Galela Sicetsha, told Mossel Bay Advertiser he is very excited about the opportunity, the great exposure for the U19 team and the chance to showcase their talents."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If the Black Aces are successful in Saturday’s game, they will advance to the next round of the tournament.","html":"If the Black Aces are successful in Saturday’s game, they will advance to the next round of the tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unfortunately, however, the travel expenses are not little. Sicetsha asks anyone able to make financial contributions to the Black Aces to contact him on 078 878 7323.","html":"Unfortunately, however, the travel expenses are not little. Sicetsha asks anyone able to make financial contributions to the Black Aces to contact him on 078 878 7323."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Black Aces FC needs your help to reach Cape Town
